summary: Start M6-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 after all upstream M6 implementation/evidence tasks are CLOSED on origin/main. The systems_architect must create docs/GATE-M6.md and record gate evidence for M6 Alpha system-complete readiness without changing product code, package code, content-source data, roadmap, acceptance matrix, prior gates, release artifacts, or frozen decisions.

tests_run.result: Clean on gate/m6-exit-validation before start checkpoint.
Task JSON was valid before start.

decisions: Start M6-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 as the M6 exit gate after M6-ALPHA-NO-P0P1-VALIDATION-001 closure PR entered origin/main at cd5cebebfe6ac7b0dd07a7468abcba9da55fd765.
Gate may record PASS, PASS_WITH_LIMITS, or BLOCKED, but must not fabricate reviewer acceptance or hide process limits.
Gate must preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE exactly; no manual node battle task, spike, or blocking research is authorized for M6/M7/M8.

Gate must not start M7 content lock, M8 release work, product code work, roadmap edits, acceptance matrix edits, release artifacts, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, branding/commercial decisions, or frozen architecture changes.
risks: R4 gate can only pass if all upstream M6 evidence is closed and no accepted P0/P1 blocker remains.
M5 PASS_WITH_LIMITS and M4 PASS_WITH_LIMITS process context must be reconciled, not erased.
M6 exit is a validation gate only; M7 transition must be separate follow-on work after main integration.
requested_action: Create docs/GATE-M6.md, update allowed status files, run required validation commands, and emit REVIEW handoff to qa_reviewer.
